title: Fletching Recipe
description:
Craft more arrows with same amount of ingredient with Fletching Recipe. 
Craft Explosive arrows with Fletching Table and blow your enemy up!
body:
# 🏹 Fletching Recipe

**Craft Explosive Arrows from your Fletching Table! 💥**  

This mod adds a **custom GUI menu** to the vanilla **Fletching Table** and lets you create amazing new items, with **Explosive Arrows** being the star feature. You can configure the explosive ingredients via JSON, giving full control over your recipes.

It also supports advanced recipe features:

- **SizedIngredient** and **DataComponentIngredient / NbtIngredient** inputs  
- Specify **input stack counts** directly in the recipe  
- Use **NBT data or Data Components** for complex items (e.g., `Lingering Potion` with specific potion content)  

Full **JSON recipe format** is documented on GitHub [README.md](https://github.com/CoolerProYT/FletchingRecipe/blob/1.21.x-neoforge/README.md) for each **Minecraft version** and **modloader**.

---

## ⚙️ Features
- Craft **Explosive Arrows** with fully configurable ingredients 💣  
- Adds GUI / Screen for the vanilla **Fletching Table**  
- Introduces a new **recipe type**: `fletchingrecipe:fletching`  
- Supports **SizedIngredient** and **NBT/DataComponent ingredients**  
- Designed for modpack and datapack creators  
- Fully compatible with **Forge**, **Fabric**, and **NeoForge**

**Make the Fletching Table actually useful — now with explosive fun!**
